titles.title: When I say I love you

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can't hardly believe that today you'll become mine God's fulfilled the dreams I had, in His perfect time Words cannot convey the way I feel, I can't believe it's true When you look into my eyes And lo, I cherish you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I say I love you I mean I always will When I say, you're mine alone there'll be no other When I give my heart to you It will be yours to keep And when I say I do I mean forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For a while I was confused So many questions from the start But I couldn't keep your precious love from reaching to my heart You are beyond what I imagine nobody love me like you do I can't believe the joy that come from being in love with you…

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And when I say I do It will be me in love with you forever… And when I say I do I mean forever…
